scripts.build:web: npm run sync:app-icon && node --max-old-space-size=4096 node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build --config apps/web/vite.config.ts
scripts.fix:source-conventions: npm run fix:type-only-imports && npm run fix:const-arrow-functions && npm run fix:blank-lines && npm run fix:short-hex-colors && npm run fix:nullish-fallback && npm run fix:known-lint-errors && npm run fix:no-compat-export-files && node scripts/fix-src-import-paths.mjs && npm run fix:alias-import-paths && node scripts/verify/fix-import-spacing.mjs && node scripts/verify/fix-source-order.mjs && node scripts/verify/fix-import-spacing.mjs && npm run fix:jsx-child-spacing && npm run fix:blank-lines
scripts.verify:source-conventions: npm run verify:no-emoji && npm run verify:no-compat-export-files && npm run verify:type-only-imports && node scripts/verify/verify-import-spacing.mjs && npm run verify:blank-lines && npm run verify:short-hex-colors && npm run verify:nullish-fallback && node scripts/verify/verify-source-conventions.mjs && npm run verify:jsx-child-spacing && npm run verify:const-arrow-functions && npm run verify:pdf-zoom-constants && npm run verify:module-constant-names
scripts.build:verify-sw: npm run build && npm run verify:sw
scripts.typecheck: npm exec tsc -- -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit --pretty false && npm exec tsc -- -p tsconfig.node.json --noEmit --pretty false
scripts.typecheck:all: npm exec tsc -- -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit --pretty false && npm exec tsc -- -p tsconfig.node.json --noEmit --pretty false
scripts.preflight: npm run verify:design-tokens && npm run verify:app-icon && npm run verify:source-conventions && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npx vitest run tests/unit/parseXlsxImport.test.ts tests/unit/importCardsFromPayload.test.ts tests/unit/features/import/XlsxImportDialog.test.tsx tests/unit/platformIndex.test.ts tests/unit/platformDesktopShellOpenExternal.test.ts
scripts.lint: npm run lint:imports && node scripts/lint-eslint-ja.mjs && npm run verify:source-conventions
